How it works

Guided every step. No pressure, no surprises.

01

Browse verified referrals

Profiles verified before listing

  • Referred by a previous employer
  • Referral contact checked
  • Work history reviewed
02

Request an intro

We confirm availability and fit

  • You choose who to meet
  • We check current availability
  • No contact details shared upfront
03

Meet & decide

Video call first, no pressure

  • Meet via Google Meet
  • Ask questions before deciding
  • We guide paperwork if you proceed
Most introductions arranged within 2–3 days
We coordinate every introduction — so both sides stay protected
Simple, transparent pricing

Browse free. Pay only if you proceed.

Helper Circle is a referral-based direct hire platform — not a traditional maid agency. Helpers are referred by previous employers. You browse, meet, and decide entirely for free.

If both sides agree to proceed, we handle the full transfer and admin process for one fixed fee. No placement commissions. No salary deductions. No hidden charges.

Not a maid agency. No placement commissions.
S$499
Fixed admin handling fee
Only charged when both sides decide to proceed
Includes
  • MOM work permit transfer
  • Insurance coordination
  • Work permit processing
  • Documentation support
  • Guided transfer process
Not included
  • No placement commissions
  • No salary deductions
  • No pressure before deciding

Why referrals work better

Better for everyone in the circle

New employer

Find a trusted helper faster

No agency fees, no guesswork. Every helper was referred by someone who employed them.

Previous employer

Pass your helper to a good family

Avoid flight and rehiring costs. Refer her directly to another local family.

  • Your referral stays private
  • We handle the introduction
  • She chooses too
For helpers

Stay in Singapore

A local transfer avoids agency debt and the stress of returning home between jobs.

  • No large agency loans
  • Smooth transition
  • Trusted new household

Honest words from Singapore families who have used Helper Circle.
